name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: run-detector.sh --cache requires --cache-location <path>
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q -- '--cache requires --cache-location' err.txt && echo location_required 1>&2
